'''Coross''' was an [[Officer/Legends|officer]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] who was appointed as acting [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] of the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Vengeance II|''Vengeance'']] after the death of Admiral [[Mordon (Human)|Mordon]].
